title: Secure Portfolio Delivery
summary: Shows how a public website can be deployed to a private S3 bucket through CloudFront without long-lived AWS credentials.

title: OIDC Deploy Pipeline
summary: Documents a GitHub Actions flow that assumes an IAM role with short-lived credentials and no stored AWS access keys.

title: Content Fallback
summary: Loads private profile and project data when present, then falls back to public example content for the generic site.
outcome: One codebase can serve both the example site and the real site.
